title: Teaching
text:
Trainer
July 2016 — Trained ICRH Mozambique staff on:

Introduction to basic statistics
Sampling and calculation of sample size
Analysis and interpretation of data
Database development using EpiData
Exporting datasets to different analysis environments
SPSS for data management, cleaning and analysis
Using digital platforms to collect data electronically (smartphone/tablet)

title: Teaching
text:
SPSS — Tutorial para Iniciantes
A tutorial developed to help Master’s in Public Health students at the Faculty of Medicine with the Biostatistics module — designed especially for those changing careers who found SPSS difficult to pick up.
Open the SPSS tutorial →

title: Data, made to make sense.
text:
Data Science · Biostatistics



I’m Antonio Rungo — Senior Strategic Information Advisor at mothers2mothers, working on HIV/PMTCT to help eliminate paediatric AIDS. Biostatistician who loves turning analysis into clear, dynamic visualization.


View dashboards Download CV


HIV/PMTCT Data Visualization Monitoring & Evaluation RStudio IA Automations Maputo, Mozambique
I am a biostatistician currently working as Senior Strategic Information Advisor. Previously I worked as an independent consultant and as an M&E advisor at an international non-governmental organization in Mozambique, focused on continuous quality improvement (CQI) — supporting internal Data Quality Assessments (iDQA) by implementing partners, providing technical assistance to the Ministry of Health, developing and delivering training materials, coordinating and aligning Global Programs activities through an M&E lens, and ongoing capacity building and mentorship for MOH and partner staff.
Earlier, I worked as a Voluntary Medical Male Circumcision (VMMC) project manager and data analyst, and as a database manager at the International Training and Education Center for Health (I-TECH) Mozambique office.
I have skills in developing and maintaining effective, up-to-date monitoring & evaluation and operational-research systems — ensuring implementation of programs and projects, designing data-entry screens, developing data-collection tools for operational research, and handling data analysis and research reporting.
My full CV is available here.

title: Projects
text: Sometimes I like to build projects and then share them with the world. Here are some examples.

title: Projects
text:
Client projects

  
    Data Visualization
    PCBG Elections 2019
    Data analysis and reporting for the MONITOR: Justiça Eleitoral, Paz e Democracia election-monitoring and violence-prevention project within the Parceria Cívica para Boa Governação (PCBG), based on the ELMO platform and ODK form submissions.
  
  
    Data Quality
    EPTS DQA Assessment
    Data analysis performed on a sample of data for the EPTS DQA conducted on patient files of those receiving ART.

title: Projects
text:
Personal projects

  
    Elections
    Resultados do Apuramento Eleitoral
    Visualizations built from data downloaded from the CIP — Center for Public Integrity — on district and provincial vote counting for the 2019 general elections (President and Parliament).
  
  
    Public Health
    COVID-19 Mozambique
    A friendlier view of the data reported by health authorities on COVID-19 in Mozambique, using the Daily COVID-19 Bulletin from MISAU as the data source.
  
  
    Web
    Pure JavaScript Typewriter Effect
    A small example showing how to create a typewriter effect with pure JavaScript — a bit of visual eye-candy that is easier than it looks.
